overall.description: Game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a vehicle driving along a desert highway toward a tunnel entrance checkpoint built into red rock cliffs. The camera passes through the checkpoint with futuristic city buildings visible in the background, then enters a long concrete tunnel with artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert highway with red rock formations

events.description: yellow sports car overtakes on the right side at high speed

agents.ego_description: driving steadily along the desert highway toward the tunnel entrance

notable_agents.action: silver sedan overtaking the camera vehicle on the right

entered.detail: large reddish-orange rock formation lining the right side of the highway
tall white lattice tower structure atop the cliff
desert trees with spiky foliage along the left roadside
dark modern structure built into the rock face marking the tunnel entrance

segments.scene_description: Driving along a sunlit desert highway with red rock cliffs on the right and sparse desert vegetation on the left. A futuristic tower stands atop the cliff in the distance. Several vehicles overtake on the right as the camera approaches the tunnel entrance structure ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: secure tunnel checkpoint with barrier gates

events.description: vehicle enters the tunnel from the desert highway, passing under the checkpoint structure
ambient light shifts from natural daylight to artificial fluorescent tunnel lighting

agents.ego_description: approaching the tunnel checkpoint and entering the enclosed tunnel space

notable_agents.action: green truck exiting the tunnel on the left side of the road

entered.detail: automated barrier gates with yellow and black markings at the tunnel mouth
vertical strips of red LED lights flanking the tunnel entrance
tall skyscrapers with digital billboards visible in the background left
smooth gray concrete walls of the tunnel interior

segments.scene_description: Approaching the tunnel checkpoint with red warning lights and barrier gates. The futuristic city skyline becomes visible on the left. The camera passes under the entrance structure and transitions into the artificially lit tunnel, leaving the desert landscape behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: long concrete vehicle tunnel with linear overhead lighting

events.description: overtaking a slower black sedan in the left lane
tunnel exit becomes visible ahead with increasing natural light

agents.ego_description: driving through the tunnel, overtaking slower vehicles and approaching the exit

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving ahead in the same lane, later overtaken

entered.detail: bright daylight visible at the far end of the tunnel indicating the exit

segments.scene_description: Driving through the long concrete tunnel illuminated by evenly spaced overhead fluorescent lights. The walls are smooth gray concrete with yellow safety lines on the road. Several vehicles are overtaken as the camera progresses toward the bright exit visible at the tunnel's end.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from a sun-drenched desert highway into the sterile, artificial environment of a concrete tunnel. It begins by cruising past red rock cliffs and sparse vegetation under a bright sky, with a futuristic tower looming in the distance as other vehicles overtake on the right. As the camera approaches a checkpoint marked by red warning lights and barrier gates, the futuristic city skyline emerges on the left before the view shifts abruptly from the open landscape into the shaded entrance structure. The scene then transitions into a long concrete tunnel illuminated by rhythmic overhead fluorescent lights and guided by yellow safety lines. Finally, the camera continues its steady progress past other vehicles, moving through the gray corridor toward the bright light of the exit.
